label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSON Fabio won a chaotic sprint after UAE Emirates deliberately shredded the peloton on rolling terrain to pressure his green jersey.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates attacks on rolling terrain targeting green jersey holder forced Quick-Step into defensive chase work, depleting sprint train.
Quick-Step positioned two riders in early break as insurance policy while Jakobson chased back from crashed peloton.
Lotto-Soudal sent Van Aert to bridge to break after it was established, revealing uncertainty about controlling finale.

rider_signals.JAKOBSON Fabio: positive: Won despite crash injuries and depleted leadout after chasing back solo, suggests exceptional current form
rider_signals.CERNY Josef: positive: Led out sprint for Jakobson after team depleted by crashes, demonstrating Quick-Step tactical flexibility
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: negative: Krieger mistakenly led out wrong rider thinking Mohorič on wheel, suggesting poor positioning in technical finale
